lines: Spain put France to the sword 2-0 in the semis, and Jim — that smug prick sitting top on 89pts — is absolutely loving it while Callum, Croft, Dene, and The Foreman all watch their French wankers trudge off in unison like the world's saddest fucking choir.

The Foreman is down in 8th on 56pts with literally every single one of his teams — France, Colombia, Türkiye, and Curaçao — wiped out. Every. Single. One. That's not a sweepstake entry, that's a crime scene.
Callum is hemorrhaging his 2nd place position in slow motion — 87pts, no teams left, just sitting there on the sofa watching other people's horses run while he slowly accepts his own irrelevance.

Today's semi-final is England vs Argentina, and it's a straight-up sweepstake knife fight — Carter and Wilmot both have England, Ellis has Argentina, and whoever loses gets to spend the rest of the tournament explaining why their team was shit.

Special mention to Wilmot — 3rd place, 87pts, and his entire portfolio is a graveyard of Morocco, Norway, and Saudi Arabia, meaning England are the ONLY reason this useless fuck hasn't already rage-quit the group chat, so pray hard you spineless twat, because one bad result tonight and you're watching Jim lift the trophy while you clutch your dead flags like a grieving widow.
fingerprint: {"r":["France (Callum & Croft & Dene & The Foreman) 0–2 Spain (Jim) [Semi-final]"],"u":["England (Carter & Wilmot) vs Argentina (Ellis) [Semi-final]"]}
